text.title: Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) that pins the shape of a valid decision-record artefact for architecture-decision-records. Subagents validate against this before returning.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "adr-auth-clerk-023", "owner": "Ruslan Faion <ruslan@faion.net>", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "adr_id": "023", "title": "Adopt Clerk for identity", "status": "Accepted", "date": "2026-05-23", "context": "Auth0 pricing climbed; we need an alternative with SSO and decent UX.", "decision": "Adopt Clerk as the primary identity provider for new signups.", "consequences": [ "Vendor concentration on Clerk", "Cheaper at current MAU" ], "alternatives_rejected": [ { "option": "WorkOS", "reason": "Higher floor cost" } ] }

example.note: Owner plural; status not in enum; alternatives_rejected empty.

forbidden.pattern: `status: Accepted` AND `date` precedes any referenced commit date by < 1 hour — likely retroactive.
